lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Sir Vyvin
lines.text: Greetings traveller.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have anything to trade?

lines.speaker: Sir Vyvin
lines.text: No, I'm sorry.

lines.speaker: Sir Vyvin
lines.text: Well, maybe I do, but you need to prove yourself worthy as a White Knight before I will sell you anything.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And how can I do that?

lines.speaker: Sir Vyvin
lines.text: Kill Black Knights and make sure you don't kill any White Knights!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, okay then.

lines.speaker: Sir Vyvin
lines.text: You are currently at Novice level within the White Knights, so your access to equipment is limited.

lines.speaker: Sir Vyvin
lines.text: I can sell you a White Knight Chainmail body for 1440 coins, and White Platemail legs for 1920 coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Sir Vyvin
lines.text: You are at Peon level within the White Knights, not much to choose from I'm afraid.

lines.speaker: Sir Vyvin
lines.text: You've reached Page level, that shows a bit of dedication you know! Your available equipment will reflect that!

lines.speaker: Sir Vyvin
lines.text: And may I say what a pleasure it is to serve any Knight who has achieved Noble level!

lines.speaker: Sir Vyvin
lines.text: And it is so very rare that I see any White Knight who has reached Adept level!

lines.speaker: Sir Vyvin
lines.text: Well of course! I AM the White Knights armourer after all!

lines.speaker: Sir Vyvin
lines.text: And for a dedicated White Knight to have reached Master level like yourself, you get only the very best of all equipment available!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are there so many knights in this city?

lines.speaker: Sir Vyvin
lines.text: We are the White Knights of Falador. We are the most powerful order of knights in the land. We are helping the king Vallance rule the kingdom as he is getting old and tired.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I just talk to you very slowly for a few minutes, while I distract you, so that my friend over there can do something while you're busy being distracted by me?

lines.speaker: Sir Vyvin
lines.text: I'm... not sure what you're asking me... you want to join the White Knights?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nope. I'm just trying to distract you.

lines.speaker: Sir Vyvin
lines.text: ... ...you are very odd.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So can I distract you some more?

lines.speaker: Sir Vyvin
lines.text: ... ...I don't think I want to talk to you anymore.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok. My work here is done. 'Bye!

lines.speaker: Sir Vyvin
lines.text: Excellent work! I have new information to share with you.

lines.speaker: Sir Vyvin
lines.text: The black knights can do puzzles better than that!

lines.speaker: Sir Vyvin
lines.text: Excellent work!

lines.speaker: Sir Vyvin
lines.text: You're not done yet! Do this for me!

lines.speaker: Sir Vyvin
lines.text: Here you go.

lines.speaker: Sir Vyvin
lines.text: Your commitment to the white knights is fantastic [player name].
